ddls:
CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "distance_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the distance (e.g., miles, kilometers) */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., residential, commercial) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the route was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "move_types" (
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each move type */,
  "move_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the move type (e.g., 2 BR, 3 BR, 4 BR) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the move type */,
  "average_weight" REAL /* Average weight of the move type */,
  "average_volume" REAL /* Average volume of the move type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("move_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cost_estimates" (
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cost estimate */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route */,
  "move_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the move type */,
  "min_cost" REAL /* Minimum cost estimate for the move */,
  "max_cost" REAL /* Maximum cost estimate for the move */,
  "fuel_surcharge" REAL /* Fuel surcharge */,
  "toll_surcharge" REAL /* Toll surcharge */,
  "insurance_surcharge" REAL /* Insurance surcharge */,
  "total_cost" REAL /* Total cost estimate */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the estimate was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the estimate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_move_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("move_type_id") REFERENCES move_types ("move_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cost_estimates_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales representative, operations manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Password hash for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost estimate being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the estimate */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the estimate was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES cost_estimates ("estimate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical entry */,
  "estimate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cost estimate */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the estimate */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the estimate was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for the historical entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_estimate_id FOREIGN KEY ("estimate_id") REFERENCES cost_estimates ("estimate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
